title: Build native_sim Meshtastic app-compat test harness
description: Why this exists: app compatibility work needs automated proof before hardware and mobile smoke tests. What needs to be done: create a native_sim or host-side test harness that feeds Meshtastic-framed protobuf bytes into the adapter and inspects FromRadio bytes and LICHEN local-interface calls. Cover connect/init, node info/status/config reads, text ingress, incoming message egress, malformed input, unsupported commands, and queue limits. Acceptance criteria: west build/twister test runs on Linux EC2 Zephyr cache; tests fail if handlers are bypassed or if raw Meshtastic RF path is used; CI-ready commands are recorded in Beads notes.
